# Chapter 9: Plates, shells, solid mechanics  (~120 pp)
- 9.1 Plate theory (15) · 9.2 Shell structures (15) · 9.3 Three-dimensional stress states (15) · 9.4 Anisotropy preview (12) · 9.5 Finite-element method introduced (20) · 9.6 Mesh quality and the engineer's responsibility (15) · 9.7 Verification, validation, and uncertainty quantification in FEM (15) · 9.8 Failure section: when FEM lies, and why beginners trust it anyway (13)

**Archetype**: stability, scaling, failure. **Project**: solve a 2D stress problem analytically; solve it again with FEM; reconcile. **Exercises**: 35.
